nl_query: For each script with an active legal hold, show the hold duration in days, whether the hold overlaps with the board evaluation deadline, whether the script has already been published, and the case reference number.
failed_sql: SELECT sh.id, sh.script_id, a.urn, sh.case_id, sh.hold_reason, sh.hold_start_date, (CURRENT_DATE - sh.hold_start_date) AS days_held, au.display_name AS placed_by, CASE WHEN de.expiry_date IS NOT NULL THEN 'Yes' ELSE 'No' END AS is_board_deadline_overlapping, CASE WHEN r.published_at IS NOT NULL THEN 'Yes' ELSE 'No' END AS is_published, de.expiry_date AS board_deadline_expiry_date FROM script_hold sh JOIN answer_script a ON a.id = sh.script_id JOIN app_user au ON au.id = sh.applied_by LEFT JOIN deadline_extension_request de ON de.board_id = sh.board_id AND de.approved_at IS NOT NULL AND de.approved_status = 'APPROVED' LEFT JOIN result r ON r.script_id = a.id WHERE sh.is_active = TRUE AND sh.released_at IS NULL AND sh.case_id IS NOT NULL ORDER BY sh.hold_start_date ASC;
error: Validation failed (schema): Hallucinated column(s): deadline_extension_request.expiry_date, deadline_extension_request.approved_status, script_hold.board_id, deadline_extension_request.expiry_date. Use only columns that exist in the schema.
